_metadata.description: Azure service catalog for the Azure Pricing MCP Server. Edit this file to add/update service aliases, deprecated services, and SKU tier mappings. Run sync_catalog.py to apply changes.

service_aliases.service_name: Azure Managed Instance for Apache Cassandra
Azure Managed Instance for Apache Cassandra
Azure Active Directory for External Identities
Azure Active Directory for External Identities
Azure Active Directory for External Identities

deprecated_services.message: QnA Maker was retired on March 31, 2025. Use Custom Question Answering in Azure AI Language instead.

deprecated_services.replacement: Conversational Language Understanding / CLU (Azure AI Language)
deprecated_services.message: LUIS was retired on October 31, 2025. Use CLU in Azure AI Language instead.

deprecated_services.replacement: Azure AI services or Azure Machine Learning
deprecated_services.message: Anomaly Detector retires October 1, 2026. No new resources can be created.

deprecated_services.replacement: Azure AI services or Azure Machine Learning
deprecated_services.message: Personalizer retires October 1, 2026. No new resources can be created.

deprecated_services.replacement: Azure Monitor or Azure Machine Learning
deprecated_services.message: Metrics Advisor retires October 1, 2026. No new resources can be created.
Content Moderator is deprecated (retires March 15, 2027). Use Azure AI Content Safety instead.
Form Recognizer has been rebranded to Azure AI Document Intelligence. Use 'document intelligence' instead.

deprecated_services.replacement: Azure AI Vision (GA) or Azure Machine Learning
deprecated_services.message: Custom Vision retires September 25, 2028. Consider migrating to Azure AI Vision or Azure ML.

sku_tiers.description: Fabric capacity SKUs map named tiers to Capacity Unit (CU) counts. API prices per CU/hour.
Cosmos DB throughput tiers map to Request Units per second (RU/s). API prices per 100 RU/hour.
AI Search tiers with fixed hourly pricing. Each tier includes set storage and partition limits.
Azure OpenAI and partner model pricing. Tiers represent per-token costs for key models. Prices are per 1K or 1M tokens depending on model.

tiers.name: PTU (Provisioned)
tiers.description: Provisioned Throughput Unit — varies by model, commitment required

sku_tiers.description: AI Foundry / Azure ML compute and managed model hosting. Tiers cover workspace compute and serverless model endpoints.

tiers.name: Workspace (Free)
tiers.description: ML workspace management — free (pay only for compute)

tiers.name: Managed Online Endpoint
tiers.description: Serverless endpoint — pay per inference request/token

sku_tiers.description: Azure AI Services (Speech, Vision, Language, Translator, etc.) under the Foundry Tools billing umbrella.

tiers.name: Free Tier (per service)
tiers.description: Most AI services offer a free tier with limited transactions/month
